chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-188 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 16-10-2024 Mr. Gul Feroze Kalwar, Advocate along with applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. **** Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application and submits that the applicant will file Crl. Direct Complaint before the competent Court of law for redressal of his grievance. He further submits that if the Crl. Direct Complaint is filed, this order shall not come in the way. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
